#set heading(numbering: "1.")
#set math.equation(numbering: "(1)")

= Aligned Mathematical Structures

Source-backed grouped formula sample

== Expressions

#par[Expression 1. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

#text("$S_{g} = \\int d^{4}x e { R(e,\\omega) +6g^{2}+2 e^{-1}\\epsilon^{\\mu\\nu\\rho\\sigma}\\bar{\\psi}_{\\mu}\\gamma_{5}\\gamma_{\\nu}(\\hat{\\mathcal{D}}_{\\rho}+ig A_{\\rho}\\sigma^{2})\\psi_{\\sigma}-\\mathcal{F}^{2} +\\mathcal{J}_{(m)}{}^{\\mu\\nu}(\\mathcal{J}_{(e) \\mu\\nu} +\\mathcal{J}_{(m) \\mu\\nu}) } ,$")

#par[Expression 2. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

#text("$V_{12}= 2^2\\cos[k_{1\\lambda_1}\\wedge k_{2\\lambda_2}+(p_{\\lambda}+q_{\\lambda})\\wedge(k_{1\\lambda_1}-k_{2\\lambda_2})]\\cos(p_{\\lambda}\\wedge q_{\\lambda}),$")

#text("$V_{34}= 2^2\\cos[k_{3\\lambda_3}\\wedge k_{4\\lambda_4}+(p_{\\lambda}+q_{\\lambda})\\wedge(k_{3\\lambda_3}-k_{4\\lambda_4})]\\cos(p_{\\lambda}\\wedge q_{\\lambda}),$")

#par[Expression 3. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

#text("$\\mathcal{I}(\\lambda \\delta + (1-\\lambda) \\delta^\\prime ) \\geq \\lambda \\sup_{\\gamma \\in \\Sigma(\\delta)} \\int_{\\mathcal{S} } f(s) d \\gamma(s) + (1-\\lambda) \\sup_{\\gamma^\\prime \\in \\Sigma(\\delta^\\prime)}\\int_{\\mathcal{S} } f(s) d \\gamma^{\\prime }(s)$")

#text("$\\geq \\lambda \\mathcal{I}(\\delta) +(1-\\lambda) \\mathcal{I}(\\delta^\\prime).$")

#par[Expression 4. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

#text("$[ e_{i}, f_{j} ] = \\delta_{ij} \\frac{k_{i} - k_{i}^{-1}}{Q_{i} -Q_{i}^{-1}}$")

#text("$k_{i}e_{j}k_{i}^{-1}= Q_{i}^{a_{ij}} e_{j},~~k_{i}f_{j}k_{i}^{-1}= Q_{i}^{-a_{ij}} f_{j}$")

#text("$k_{i}k_{i}^{-1}=k_{i}^{-1}k_{i}=1,~~k_{i}k_{j} = k_{j}k_{i}$")

#text("$[ e_{i}, e_{i} ] = [ f_{i}, f_{i} ] = 0, \\text{if} ~~~a_{ii} = 0$")

#par[Expression 5. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

#text("$\\mathcal{R}_{\\beta_0,\\beta_1}(z):=(\\mathcal{A}_0 -zI)^{-1} - (I-z \\mathcal{A}_0^{-1})^{-1}\\Pi(\\overline{\\beta_0 + \\beta_1 M(z)})^{-1}\\beta_1(\\Pi^*( I - z \\mathcal{A}_0^{-1})^{-1} )$")

#text("$= (\\mathcal{A}_0 -zI)^{-1}-S(z)(\\overline{\\beta_0 + \\beta_1 M(z)})^{-1}\\beta_1S^*(\\overline{z}).$")
